overview.noResourcesInGroup: No resources added to this group.
overview.allClearDescription: No resources added to this status page yet. Please add some resources from the dashboard.

incidents.title: Incidents
incidents.noneDescription: No incidents posted on this status page.
incidents.notFound: Incident not found on this status page.

episodes.notFound: Episode not found on this status page.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.noneDescription: No announcements posted so far on this page.
announcements.notFound: Announcement not found on this status page.

scheduledEvents.title: Scheduled Events
scheduledEvents.noneDescription: No scheduled events posted for this status page.
scheduledEvents.notFound: No scheduled event found for this status page.

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.emailSentCheckSpam: An email with the link has been sent to your email. If you don't see the email, please check your spam folder.

email.title: Subscribe by Email
email.description: All of our updates will be sent to this email address.
email.managePrompt: Please enter your email you have subscribed with
email.manageDescription: We will send you a manage subscription link to this email.

sms.title: Subscribe by SMS
sms.description: All of our updates will be sent to this phone number.
sms.managePrompt: Please enter your phone number you have subscribed with
sms.manageDescription: We will send you a manage subscription link to this phone number.

slack.title: Subscribe by Slack
slack.description: All of our updates will be sent to this Slack webhook.
slack.workspaceNameDescription: Enter your Slack workspace name for validation.
slack.webhookUrlDescription: Status page updates will be sent to this Slack webhook.
slack.managePrompt: Please enter your Slack workspace name you have subscribed with
slack.manageDescription: We will send you a manage subscription link to this workspace.

microsoftTeams.title: Subscribe by Microsoft Teams
microsoftTeams.description: All of our updates will be sent to this Teams webhook.
microsoftTeams.workspaceNameDescription: Enter your Microsoft Teams workspace name for validation.
microsoftTeams.webhookUrlDescription: Status page updates will be sent to this Teams webhook.
microsoftTeams.managePrompt: Please enter your Microsoft Teams workspace name you have subscribed with
microsoftTeams.manageDescription: We will send you a manage subscription link to this workspace.

resources.allDescription: Select this option if you want to subscribe to all resources.
resources.selectDescription: Please select the resources you want to subscribe to.

eventTypes.allDescription: Select this option if you want to subscribe to all event types.
eventTypes.selectDescription: Please select the event types you want to subscribe to.

update.title: Update Subscription
update.description: You can update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe here.
update.unsubscribeDescription: Please select this if you would like to unsubscribe from all resources.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: If you have forgotten your password for {{statusPageName}}, please enter your email and the password reset link will be sent to you.
forgotPassword.success: We have emailed you the password reset link. Please do not forget to check spam.

resetPassword.description: Create a new password for your {{statusPageName}} account.
resetPassword.instructions: Please enter your new password and we will have it updated.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. Please log in.

masterPassword.prompt: Please enter the password to continue.

notFound.title: Page not found.
notFound.description: Page you are looking for does not exist.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.description: You do not have permission to access this page.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
